EZWallet

Latest Writing

Thoughts on backend development, system design, and tools.

Building a RAG Pipeline for WhatsApp

Apr 16, 2026 1 min

How I used LangChain, GPT-4o, and a Vector Database to build a chatbot that actually gives accurate answers.

Why I Use ClickHouse for Trade Analytics

Apr 16, 2026 1 min

PostgreSQL is great for OLTP, but when you need to aggregate billions of rows in under 2 seconds, ClickHouse is the answer.

How I Built a Same-Slot Trading Engine on Solana

Apr 16, 2026 1 min

A deep dive into building EZWallet, an autonomous trading system that executes in the same Solana slot as the trigger event.

Experience

Where I've worked and what I've built.

Python Backend Developer

HCL Technologies

Bangalore, India · April 2023 - Present

  • Built and maintained production Python services across 3 active projects: an autonomous Solana trading bot, an AI-powered WhatsApp chatbot, and an operations management platform.
  • Wrote and reviewed REST API contracts, PostgreSQL schemas, and Kafka event flows, keeping 30+ endpoints consistent across services.
  • Wrote unit and integration tests for every feature branch, maintaining 85%+ coverage.
  • Set up GitHub Actions and GitLab CI pipelines that run lint, tests, build, and deploy on every pull request.
